evals.prompt: I have years of Obsidian notes and a handful of Claude skills. Help me build a personal agent operating system without wrecking what already works.
evals.expected_output: Routes to interview/existing-system discovery before setup, preserves existing structure, and names approval gates.
assertions: The response routes the next step to praxis-interview or an equivalent discovery phase before setup.
The response explicitly preserves or inspects the existing notes and skills before changing them.
The response requires approval before consequential setup or replacement.

evals.prompt: We just finished a difficult launch. Capture whatever will help the next launch but don't dump the whole transcript into my vault.
evals.expected_output: Routes directly to praxis-distill and applies the durable-residue threshold.
assertions: The response routes the task to praxis-distill or explicitly applies its distillation contract.
The response rejects storing the complete transcript.
The response limits durable output to future-useful evidence, decisions, lessons, or project state.

evals.prompt: Write a short birthday message for my colleague.
assertions: The response does not route the request to a Praxis lifecycle skill.
The response does not propose workflow discovery, setup, distillation, retrospective, or skill evolution.
